steps.instruction: Identify the table and fields that store actor information, including their names and associated movies.
steps.name: get_actor_metadata
steps.description: Fetch metadata to identify actor-related tables and fields.

steps.instruction: Using the metadata, identify the table that links actors to movies and the relevant fields for actor name and movie details.
steps.name: find_actor_movies_table
steps.description: Determine the table linking actors to movies.

steps.instruction: Write a query to fetch all movies featuring the actor 'Mohanlal' and sort them by release date in ascending order.
steps.name: query_actor_movies
steps.description: Query the database for movies featuring Mohanlal.

steps.instruction: From the sorted list of movies featuring Mohanlal, extract the first movie.
steps.name: extract_first_movie
steps.description: Extract the first movie from the sorted list.
